# Manifest of cmake-xray DOT report goldens (AP M5-1.3).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one .dot golden file in
# this directory. tests/validate_dot_reports.py and the Graphviz dot -Tsvg
# CTest gate both consume this manifest and require directory/manifest
# parity.
#
# Tranche A creates this manifest empty; Tranche C adds the analyze and
# impact goldens that lock the DOT contract in place. Per-platform variants
# (*_windows.dot) cover host-divergent path semantics — see comments in
# tests/e2e/run_e2e.sh for which case selects each branch. Goldens whose
# fixtures rely on on-disk source files (truncating_compile_db,
# impact_truncating_compile_db, m2/basic_project, m4/with_targets) embed
# "HOSTPATH" instead of TU unique_keys and are compared via
# assert_dot_stdout_equals_file in run_e2e.sh.

# Analyze goldens
analyze_compile_db_only.dot
analyze_file_api_only.dot
analyze_mixed_input.dot
analyze_default_top.dot
analyze_top_truncated.dot
analyze_budget_truncated.dot
analyze_escaping.dot
analyze_escaping_windows.dot

# Impact goldens
impact_compile_db_direct.dot
impact_file_api_only.dot
impact_file_api_only_windows.dot
impact_mixed_input.dot
impact_budget_untruncated.dot
impact_heuristic_edges.dot
impact_heuristic_targets.dot
impact_truncated.dot
impact_absolute.dot
impact_absolute_windows.dot
